support only cacti and succoulent plants.
During the rainy season the area turns
green with vegetation and grass. The
eastern part of the island is greener
as it receives more rainfall. A 1994
indigenous species of plants including the
growing in irrigated areas while the dry
areas are dominated by the cacti variety.
Sea grapes and palm trees are a common
sight with mangroves and shrubs surviving
in the saline coastal swamps. Coconut
palm was brought to the island from the
